name: lyhcode-agent-skills
description: A collection of agent skills by lyhcode.
author: lyhcode

skills.name: 1password-cli
skills.description: Manage 1Password items, vaults, and secrets using the op CLI

skills.name: pbcopy
skills.description: Copy text, HTML, or images to the macOS clipboard using pbcopy and osascript

skills.name: awscli
skills.description: Manage AWS services using the AWS CLI including S3, EC2, IAM, Lambda, and more

skills.name: tailscale-cli
skills.description: Manage Tailscale VPN using the tailscale CLI for networking, file sharing, and service exposure

skills.name: gandi-cli
skills.description: Manage Gandi.net domains, DNS records, certificates, and email using the gandi CLI

skills.name: synology-cli
skills.description: Manage Synology NAS via SSH using administrative CLI utilities (synouser, synogroup, synoshare, synonet, synoservice, synowin)
